name: genpark-brand-voice-consistency-skill
description: GenPark AI Agent Skill - Audit and enforce brand voice consistency across marketing copy. Scores tone alignment, detects prohibited phrases, flags inconsistencies, and suggests rewrites.
author: genpark

brand_profile.description: Brand voice profile with tone, values, prohibited_words, preferred_words, and persona.

content_pieces.description: List of content strings to audit.

strict_mode.description: If true, flags any deviation from the brand profile.

audit_results.description: Per-piece audit with consistency score, issues found, and rewrite suggestions.

overall_score.description: Average consistency score across all content pieces.
